steps.title: Identify the right triangle and angle x
steps.content: The triangle has a right angle at the bottom left, with the vertical side measuring 7 and the horizontal side measuring 26. Angle $x°$ is at the top left, formed between the vertical side and the hypotenuse.

steps.title: Apply the tangent ratio to angle x
steps.content:
From angle $x°$'s perspective:
  • Opposite side: the horizontal side = 26
  • Adjacent side: the vertical side = 7
Using the tangent ratio:
$$\tan x° = \frac{\text{opposite}}{\text{adjacent}} = \frac{26}{7}$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
